subject: refactor(theme): migrate QueryBuilder (996 lines) and DebugPill to Tailwind
body:
Convert the two largest remaining CSS files to Tailwind utility classes:

QueryBuilder.css (996→7 lines): All 50+ classes across 5 TSX files
(QueryBuilder, SearchModeContent, ConnectModeContent, QueryStepPanel,
QueryFilterRow) converted. Mobile collapsed bar, sticky actions, touch
targets, mode switcher, connect panels all use responsive Tailwind.

DebugPill.css (269 lines): Fully deleted. All classes converted to
Tailwind in DebugPill.tsx.

App.css cleanup: Removed ~215 lines of orphaned CSS rules that were
already migrated to Tailwind in earlier commits.

Total: ~1,590 lines of CSS deleted.

Tags: theme, tailwind, migration, query-builder, debug
Complexity: 5
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch
